label: Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation

node.label: Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation
node.definition: Robustness and out-of-distribution evaluation stress a model under corruptions, subgroup shifts, unseen domains, adversarial inputs, and changing deployment conditions.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation is modeled as depending on Probability theory, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics and feeding downstream nodes such as Adversarial robustness & security testing, Formal verification of models.
